## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Checklist/control update
- [ ] Template/register/questionnaire update
- [ ] Framework mapping update
- [ ] README or contributor guidance
- [ ] Other documentation change

## Governance impact

Explain who benefits from this change and what risk, control, or workflow it improves.

## Validation

- [ ] Markdown renders correctly.
- [ ] Links and file paths have been checked.
- [ ] Tables, CSV headers, or checklist formatting remain easy to copy and use.
- [ ] Any related README, template, or mapping references were updated.

## Confidentiality and safety

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, tokens, private URLs, customer data, production logs, proprietary prompts, or confidential source code are included.
- [ ] No legal, regulatory, or compliance claim is presented as final advice.
- [ ] Any vendor or tool reference is factual, neutral, and clearly framed as an example where applicable.
